case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. ALFREDO VELEZ ORTEGA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT ORTEGA, ALFREDO VELEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTEGA, ALFREDO VELEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED JAN-16-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORTEGA, ALFREDO VELEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ENNY CUDNY, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT ALFREDO VELEZ ORTEGA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2017 - JUDGMENT.
